OptionDescription.SourceString: Defines what text you want to appear in the main body of the dialog. Use {playername} to dynamically include the name of the player viewing the dialog, and <cr> to include a line break.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Defines what text you want to appear in the main body of the dialog. Use {playername} to dynamically include the name of the player viewing the dialog, and <cr> to include a line break.
